PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Velasco, via ZOOM, counsel for Becky Lau, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries if there are any objections to this petition, none are presented. The court then advises counsel that the court is striking the disclaimers as untimely, in open court.

The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Continued To Jul-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Becky Lau in Propria Persona.
Kevin Lau (Son of Becky) also present.

Mr. Lau stated that they obtained an Attorney, that they have determined that what the Probate Examiner is requesting does not exist and that they are requesting that this petition be dismissed without prejudice/taken off calendar. Mr. Lau also stated that Attorney will be filing a petition for probate, that the Attorney is not representing them in this petition and that the Attorney will start representing them as of the time the new petition is filed. The Petition for Spousal Property is off calendar. Mr. Lau is to inform his Attorney that he has to use the same case number when he files the petition for probate.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Becky Lau (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.
Kevin Lau (Son) also present.

Mr. Lau stated that they are in the process of hiring an Attorney and processing the proper documents to resolve this matter, that his Mother will be signing the contract today, that the current grant deed only contains his Father's name and that they are gathering the documents as requested by the Probate Examiner. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to April 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner to appear on January 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why she has not addressed the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Spousal Property is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
